chunks.title: Ish-bosheth's Fear and Mephibosheth's History
chunks.reason: Sets the scene with Ish-bosheth's reaction to Abner's death and provides background on Mephibosheth.

chunks.title: The Assassination of Ish-bosheth
chunks.reason: Describes the arrival of Rechab and Baanah, their entry into the house, and the killing of Ish-bosheth.

chunks.title: David's Judgment on the Assassins
chunks.reason: Contains the assassins' report to David, David's argumentative response, and the execution of the men.
